headline: Musk Goes To Court To Block OpenAI's For-Profit Transition
summary: Elon Musk has filed for a court injunction to halt OpenAI from transitioning into a for-profit organization, as per a recent court filing.

headline: Gaming Company Bets Big On Bitcoin, Selling Ethereum For $50M Boost
summary: Hong Kong-based gaming firm Boyaa Interactive has traded its Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) holdings for nearly $50 million in Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC).
